chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 4847 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.5286/2023 (R/Surety) 12.09.2023 Applicant Bashir Hussain Kandhro, present in person. Mr. Bahawaluddin Shaikh, Special Prosecutor NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Listed application has been filed seeking return of surety document furnished before Additional Registrar of this Court. It appears that this Court vide order dated 31.12.2015 granted interim pre-arrest bail to petitioner Roshan Ali and 02 others in the sum of Rs.5,00,000/- each against their call up notices issued by NAB, Sukkur in an investigation, which was then converted into Reference No.24 of 2015 before learned Judge, Accountability Court, Sukkur. After grant of interim pre-arrest bail to petitioners, the applicant stood surety on behalf of petitioner No.1 Roshan Ali by submitting original Solvency Certificate No.60 dated 31.12.2015, issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Kotdiji. Subsequently, the petitioner joined the trial and ultimately vide judgment dated 20.11.2017, he and others have been convicted and sentenced. Photocopy of such judgment has been placed on record by the applicant. The report of Accountant of this Court reflects that aforesaid surety document is still lying in the office of this Court. Besides, the surety documents furnished against petitioners No.2 and 3 have already been returned by this Court vide orders dated 06.12.2017 and 08.05.2019, respectively. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB concedes to the above facts and extends his no objection to grant of this application.

Besides, the surety documents furnished against petitioners No.2 and 3 have already been returned by this Court vide orders dated 06.12.2017 and 08.05.2019, respectively. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB concedes to the above facts and extends his no objection to grant of this application. In view of above, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document mentioned above to applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. Let copy of this order be sent to the Mukhtiarkar concerned. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
